approvalSource: Steve approved the raw-green repair pivot after repeated connector failures, false-green health checks, Orchestrator review feedback, and the ship/fanout bootstrap fix needed to retire repeated failures only after clean fanout proof.
scopeSummary: Repair current connector/meeting workflow failures, expose repeated-failure blockers, fail closed on false-green health, and fix ship/fanout proof sequencing without deleting telemetry.
constraints: Governed connector uptime job proof must show a later successful foundation_job_runs row after the May 19 10:05 EDT failure.
System health and operating reliability checks must not exit green while embedded workflow health is red/yellow.
Repeated-failure telemetry must resolve only from real later proof; do not delete or rewrite red telemetry.
No broad private/auth extraction, Drive permission mutation, email sends, Agent Feedback sends, external writes, or parallel builders.
